notes: Stat priority: Agility, then Hit/Expertise to 7.5% caps, then Crit > Haste > Mastery. Drops listed are 25 Heroic; Normal/Flex versions are the same items at lower item level. Draft compiled from Icy Veins MoP Classic guides.
